theme: barges transiting a staircase of canal locks
title: Green-Wave Scheduling at the Bottleneck Lock Chamber
strategies: FCFS-with-batching by arrival order, ignoring due dates and the water budget (baseline, ratio ~0.1)
myopic earliest-due-first dispatch, batched but blind to the switch-cost asymmetry (greedy, chases due dates into frequent expensive switches)

budget the switch count from the water supply first (S_max = floor((W0-K_needed*ws)/(wa-ws))), then search a small family of evenly-spread direction-block skeletons and keep the one with the lowest realized objective (strong)
exact optimal water-aware batch scheduling under weighted tardiness (open; no known polynomial construction)
